title: prangos arenaria
intro: Prangos arenaria, also known as sea buckthorn, is a thorny shrub native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and bioactive compounds, which are believed to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prangos arenaria include improving cardiovascular health, boosting the immune system, and supporting skin and eye health, as well as being used to treat various gastrointestinal issues. Prangos arenaria can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
